groups.integration: Masjid has a live platform integration with real iqamah times managed by staff. Pull from platform URL — no website scraping needed.
groups.scrape: Masjid publishes iqamah times as static HTML on their website. Must be scraped. Times change seasonally.
groups.fallback: No website, inaccessible, or no iqamah data on any platform. AlAdhan calculated ADHAN times used as proxy — NOT iqamah. Contact masjid directly.

integration._label: 🟢 INTEGRATION — Live platform, auto-updating iqamah times
integration._note: Do NOT scrape these masjids' main websites. Pull from the platform URL.

masjids.name: Muslim Community Center of Greater San Diego (MCC)
masjids.fetch_method: GET prayers_url — HTML table with Begins + Iqama columns
masjids.notes: MCC is claimed on The Masjid App — staff actively manage iqamah. 'Updated today' label confirms live data.

masjids.name: Al-Ribat Mosque (Masjid Ar-Ribat Al-Islami)
masjids.fetch_method: GET prayers_url — HTML table with STARTS + IQAMAH columns
masjids.notes: platform_id confirmed from timing.athanplus.com embed found on site.

masjids.name: Islamic Center of Mira Mesa (Masjid Hamza)
masjids.address: 9625 Black Mountain Rd #204, San Diego, CA 92126
masjids.fetch_method: GET prayers_url — HTML with ATHAN + IQAMAH blocks
masjids.notes: platform_id confirmed from <a href> link in homepage HTML.

masjids.name: Darululoom San Diego (Crescent Academy)
masjids.fetch_method: GET prayers_url — HTML table with Begins + Iqama columns
masjids.notes: Claimed on The Masjid App since Jan 2025. 477 followers. 3 Jumu'ah sessions with separate iqamah times.

masjids.name: Masjid Al Huda (Huda Community Center)
masjids.platform_id: unknown — retrieve from portal.masjidal.com Integrations tab
masjids.fetch_method: Scrape homepage — Masjidal WP plugin renders full adhan + iqamah directly in page HTML
masjids.notes: platform_id is in PHP runtime, not in rendered HTML. Times ARE fully rendered in page — parse directly.

scrape._label: 🟡 SCRAPE — Iqamah times in static HTML on website
scrape._note: Scrape their homepage. Times change seasonally — re-scrape weekly.

masjids.name: Islamic Center of San Diego (ICSD)
masjids.scrape_method: BeautifulSoup — IQAMA TIMES block in <td>, regex on prayer name keys

masjids.name: Islamic Center of San Diego East County
masjids.scrape_method: BeautifulSoup — IQAMAH TIMES section, Fajr + 4 Jumu'ah sessions
masjids.notes: Only Fajr iqamah on site. 4 Jumu'ah sessions.

masjids.name: Masjidul Taqwa
masjids.scrape_method: BeautifulSoup — Jumu'ah time in page body only
masjids.notes: Jumu'ah only on site. Full daily schedule via iOS Taqwa App.

masjids.name: Masjid As-Sunnah
masjids.scrape_method: BeautifulSoup — no times currently, monitor each run
masjids.notes: No prayer times on site yet. Follow @masjidassunnahsd on Instagram.

fallback._label: 🔴 FALLBACK — No live iqamah data. AlAdhan calculated ADHAN times only.
fallback._note: Contact each masjid directly for real iqamah times.

masjids.name: Afghan Community Islamic Center (ACIC)
masjids.notes: 4.9⭐. Check monthly — if SSL renewed, can be scraped.

masjids.name: Islamic Center of El Cajon (Masjid Al-Firdaws)
masjids.address: 557 El Cajon Blvd, El Cajon, CA 92020
